name: ECO TS-62
_notes: All openingMoments back-calibrated from ECO Toolbox screenshots. Equipment input doesn't change these values for TS-62: imgs B14/B15 (DEFAULT eq) back-solve to the same EN3/EN4 values as the HQ-equipment screenshots.
Per TS-62 datasheet: EN 2-5, door width ≤1250mm, PMR/DIN 18040/DIN SPEC 1104 compliant, factory delivery at size 3.
maxWeightByWidth shared with TS-62 G and TS-20 (Decision Guide column 2).

name: ECO TS-62 G
_notes: All openingMoments back-calibrated from screenshots. Equipment input verified not to affect TS-62 G at any size (imgs B16-B19 with DEFAULT equipment match the HQ values exactly).
G/non-G ratios per size: EN2=1.10, EN3=1.11, EN4=1.10, EN5=1.03.

name: ECO TS-61
_notes: openingMoments: EN3, EN5, EN6 all directly back-calculated; values confirmed equal under HQ and DEFAULT equipment (multiple screenshots cross-check).
EN4 not directly measurable in any screenshot — falls back to DEFAULT_OPENING_MOMENT_NM (37 Nm). Could be anywhere from ~35-38 Nm based on G/non-G ratios at neighbouring sizes.
Per TS-61 datasheet: EN 3-6, door width ≤1400mm, EN 1154 leaf weights up to 120 kg (extended 250 kg with object-specific declaration). DIN 18040 up to EN 4 only. Delivery at size 3.
maxWeightByWidth shared with TS-61 G (Decision Guide column 1).

name: ECO TS-61 G
_notes: Primary openingMoments are HQ values: EN3 from img 12, EN4 from old case 9, EN5 from img 13, EN6 from img 14. EN3 confirmed equal under DEFAULT eq (img B20).

openingMomentsByEquipment.default[4] = 26.87 from img 9 of the second batch — TS-61 G EN4 is the ONLY (product, size) in the entire ~50-case dataset where the Equipment input shifts the opening moment (38.81 → 26.87 under DEFAULT, a 31% drop). Mechanism unknown.
Per TS-61 datasheet: G variant for opposite-hinge installation. Closing arc 120° (vs 180° for non-G).

name: ECO TS-51
_notes: All four sizes back-calibrated from screenshots (HQ equipment): EN1 from old case 8, EN2 from img 16, EN3 from img 17, EN4 from img 18.
Not listed in the ECO Decision Guide one-pager; no maxWeightByWidth available.

name: ECO TS-51 G
_notes: Full EN1-EN4 calibration. Sources: EN1 from img 19 (batch 2), EN2 from img 20 (batch 2), EN3 from img 1 (batch 3), EN4 from img 2 (batch 3).
G/non-G ratios: EN1=1.07, EN2=1.00, EN3=1.03, EN4=1.13. Notably, TS-51 G EN4 = 38.81 is identical to TS-61 G EN4 — likely a shared mechanism across ECO product families.
Not listed in the ECO Decision Guide one-pager.

name: ECO TS-52
_notes: Full EN2-EN5 calibration from third batch imgs 3-6 (B variant). Notably, TS-52 (B) EN4 = 37.68 exactly matches TS-62 EN4 — likely shared internal calibration.
Not listed in the ECO Decision Guide one-pager.

name: ECO TS-52
_notes: Full EN2-EN5 calibration from third batch imgs 7-10 (G variant). G/B ratios are very small: 1.02 to 1.06 across the range — much less variant penalty than TS-62 G/TS-62.
Not listed in the ECO Decision Guide one-pager.

name: ECO TS-41
_notes: Full EN1-EN4 calibration. EN1/EN2/EN3 from third batch imgs 11-13; EN4 = 37 confirmed by both the ECO Newton TS-41 datasheet (DIN 18040 compliance section) and consistent with the matrix-green cells in the screenshots.
TS-41 is consistently 5-11% higher opening moment than TS-51 at the same EN size (different product family with different gearing).
Per TS-41 datasheet: EN 1-4, door width ≤1100mm, fully DIN 18040 compliant across all sizes, factory delivery at size 3.
maxWeightByWidth shared with TS-14 EN and ITS 420 (Decision Guide column 3).
